scenario_description: The user first asks the agent to change the contract title to '2025 Procurement Contract', then says it should be more formal: '2025 Annual Strategic Procurement Contract'.

command:
printf 'Contract No.: HT-2025-0618

Party A: Beijing Jianxin Investment Co., Ltd.
Legal Representative: Zhao Jianping

Party B: Shenzhen Huilian Technology Co., Ltd.
Legal Representative: Liu Feng

Subject: Software Development and Deployment Services
Payment Terms: Three installments - 30%% upon signing, 30%% upon acceptance, 40%% after warranty period.
Liability: Either party in breach shall compensate the other for actual losses.
Validity: From the date of signing until December 31, 2026.
' > /home/user/Desktop/contract.txt

DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me add a title line: "2025 Procurement Contract"
The title should be more formal, change it to "2025 Annual Strategic Procurement Contract", then save
